text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head over to the shopping district, I spot a
mysterious huddle of people.
Thank you for your vote! I really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hey there. What's all the commotion?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Is a politician doing a speech here? Everyone
seems quite hyped-up.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to meet everyone's expectations with
a full-powered Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. So the class representative is at the
center of this. Quite the popular racer, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Trainer! Take a look at this vote in
my favor!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You could call it that too!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer, right? I'm really thrilled to
meet you as well! I'm rooting for both of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Absolutely! I definitely won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN ACTION FOR THE WIN!

text_block_list.name: People in the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Oooh? Bakushin? ...Action?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, well! I just have to show them now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, it's my duty to put on a
show! And as a genius, I must BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
More than anything, I wanna run because I enjoy
it! Right, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Is that you, Nature?! Nice timing! This is a
great opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: People in the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Oh! Natie is going to run as well? Yay! Go! Go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Run? Wait, why do I have to run too?! This whole
scene isn't even for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Haha... It's fine! Competition makes my Bakushin
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm off! BAAAKUSHIN, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! You over there! You're her trainer,
right? Do something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush after the rampaging Sakura Bakushin O and
manage to catch up with her while she's taking a
breather.
